description: Within-set Hoenn Ralts-line evolution 1:1 mirror. Ralts (Stage 1, no. 280) -> Kirlia (Stage 2, no. 281) -> Gardevoir or Gallade (Stage 3), with the in-corpus pair being the base-to-mid leg of the Hoenn psychic-empath line. Adjacent collector numbers (059-060) within Chilling Reign. The fan to 1:N via Kirlia BUS-92 (trivia'd) and Kirlia LOT-140 (vision-only) was considered and deferred — the within-set adjacent-number mirror is the strongest single edge, and cross-print Kirlias can attach to the same canonical connection later without restructuring. Mirrors the Sobble/Drizzile within-set Galar Water starter evolution edge (slot 1 of this same QUAD pass) and the wave-14 Charmander/Charmeleon/Charizard pattern.
other_candidates_considered: 1:N fan from CRE-060 Kirlia to BUS-92 Kirlia + LOT-140 Kirlia (cross-print Kirlias) — deferred; the within-set adjacent-number evolution mirror is the canonical Edgelord shape and the cross-print Kirlia mirror is a distinct semantic axis (same-character cross-print, not evolution-line) that would dilute this edge's narrative weight. The cross-print Kirlia 1:N is a separate future move; the existing connections bullet on CRE-060 already names the BUS-92 and LOT-140 prints as future-attaching candidates.

Ralts-line ancestor Mr. Nodeley character node — defer; only 2 corpus members of the line currently enriched (CRE-059 Ralts + CRE-060 Kirlia, plus BUS-92 Kirlia and LOT-140 Kirlia which are cross-prints of one member). Threshold should be 3+ DISTINCT species in line, not 3+ corpus cards. Gardevoir / Gallade not yet in corpus. Defer.
